mentions.text:
@MMerrino569447 I don't normally invest in small caps but we got the triple rate cut projection. So this is purely a macro trade..

$PLMR looks solid like $UPWK. But triple rate cut hurts them because of lower investment income, so it doesn't  get the benefit like other heavy-debt small caps.

reasons: triple rate cut hurts because of lower investment income
does not get benefit like other heavy-debt small caps
